name: pdca-skill-creator
description: Create PDCA-based Codex skills with lifecycle-isolated creator evolution, business-skill generation, runtime checks, evidence-based review proposals, install verification, quality gates, and clean packaging.

interface.longDescription: Create Codex skills that follow a PDCA loop with Plan, Do, Check, and Act stages while preserving the business core first. Work is isolated into four periods: creator evolution, business-skill generation, runtime and checking, and evidence-based review. Runtime writes stay in work directories; review produces scoped change proposals; only anonymized, reproducible feedback can return to creator evolution through regression tests. The creator also requires confirmation tables, Do-script plans, install verification, configurable Python entrypoints, sample-based crawler checks, network diagnostics, maturity grading, contract-consistent checks, and clean plugin directories.
defaultPrompt: Use $pdca-skill-creator to create a skill for a recurring workflow.
Use $pdca-skill-creator to upgrade an existing workflow skill.
Use $pdca-skill-creator to design a self-checking inspection skill.
Use $pdca-skill-creator to run iterative creator use case tests and improve the creator rules.
